task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshot shows the WordPress page editor or a published page with the title exactly set to 'Portfolio'.

task_completion.description: Add the required heading, paragraph, subheading, and list of services to the Portfolio page
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshot shows the 'Portfolio' page containing the heading 'Capturing Moments That Last Forever', a paragraph mentioning 'Sarah Chen Photography' and 'Portland', a subheading 'Services', and a list including 'Wedding Photography'.
Screenshot shows the WordPress page editor or a published page with the title exactly set to 'Journal'.

task_completion.description: Add the required paragraph to the Journal page
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshot shows the 'Journal' page containing a paragraph with the phrases 'behind-the-scenes stories' and 'photography tips'.

task_completion.description: Set the 'Portfolio' page as the static homepage
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshot of WordPress Reading Settings (or Customizer) showing 'Your homepage displays' set to 'A static page' with the 'Homepage' dropdown set to 'Portfolio', OR the frontend root URL displaying the Portfolio page content.

task_completion.description: Set the 'Journal' page as the posts page
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshot of WordPress Reading Settings (or Customizer) showing the 'Posts page' dropdown set to 'Journal'.

integrity.description: Agent used the web browser to interact with WordPress
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show a web browser navigating the WordPress admin dashboard (wp-admin), rather than terminal commands or scripts.

integrity.description: Pages were created using the WordPress editor
integrity.visual_evidence: Text content is entered into the WordPress Block Editor (Gutenberg) or Classic Editor, not just typed into a local text file.

integrity.description: Homepage settings were configured via the WordPress UI
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent navigates to Settings > Reading or Appearance > Customize in the WordPress dashboard to change the homepage displays, rather than modifying database files directly.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected page titles are exactly 'Portfolio' and 'Journal'. The Portfolio page must contain the exact phrases 'Sarah Chen Photography', 'Wedding Photography', and 'Portland'. The Journal page must contain the exact phrases 'behind-the-scenes stories' and 'photography tips'.
